title: Gynandropsis lateralis

This family includes over 2,000 species of plants. Gynandropsis lateralis is further classified within the genus Gynandropsis, which consists of a small number of species. The species is native to certain regions and is also known by various common names. The classification of Gynandropsis lateralis is subject to ongoing research and may be revised as new information becomes available.

intro: Gynandropsis gynandriopside is also known as Gynandropsis lateralis, a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help in the treatment of various diseases. The bioactive constituents of Gynandropsis gynandriopside include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
